app.name: sem
app.one_liner: A semantic version control CLI that shows diffs at the code entity level (functions, classes, etc.) across 21 languages using tree-sitter.

screens.name: Semantic Diff Viewer
screens.purpose: Display entity-level changes (added, modified, deleted) per file with clear visual indicators.
primary_actions: Run semantic diff on current Git repo

rust_commands.name: run_semantic_diff
rust_commands.purpose: Execute semantic diff analysis using tree-sitter parsers to detect entity-level changes in source code.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement core semantic diff logic in Rust
week 1: Integrate tree-sitter for 21 supported languages
week 1: Support Git repo and arbitrary file input modes
acceptance_tests: Correctly displays property changes in YAML config files as shown in documentation
Installs and runs via Cargo, binary, and Docker as documented
Shows function additions/deletions/modifications in TypeScript files like README example
Works without setup in any Git repository or on standalone files
